productDisplayName: W Women Solid Sea Green Kurti
description: Composition Sea green kurti made of 100% cotton, has mega sleeves, V-neck with woven panel stitch along the neckline and down the front and light elastication at the waist Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this classic piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
